caption:
Golden hour hits the library glass just right, painting the room in honeyed light.

I'm Elena, and I'm adjusting my tight blouse and skirt, feeling every curve I've worked to highlight while keeping my professional secrets safe. The air smells like jasmine and ink, fresh and sharp like the spring breeze outside. I own this classroom. And I own this view. 🌸☕ #SunnyDays #ProfessorLife
